action_text: Hover over a small bar near the right end of the chart to display its tooltip
rationale: We need to read the smallest bar’s tooltip to get the agent name and exact count; hovering near the right end is most likely to reveal the minimum.

action_text: Hover over the adjacent small bar near the right end to show its tooltip
rationale: If the first hover doesn’t show a tooltip, trying the adjacent small bar can reveal another candidate for the minimum count.

action_text: Hover over another small bar toward the right side to view its tooltip
rationale: Continue checking nearby small bars to ensure we capture all agents tied at the minimum value.
Opening the chart’s options may provide a “Show data” or similar view listing labels and counts, which would quickly reveal the minimum and corresponding agents.

action_text: Click a small bar near the right end to open its drilldown list
rationale: If hovering isn’t reliable, drilling into a small bar will open the underlying records and confirm the assignee and count.
